input:
Incident Post-Mortem — April 18, 2026
Incident Commander: Yusuf Adeyemi
Attendees: Yusuf Adeyemi, Maria Santos, Felix Braun, Ivan Petrov

Summary: 47-minute outage on April 17. Root cause: Postgres connection pool exhausted due to long-running analytics query by Felix's reporting job.
Timeline: 14:03 outage started, 14:50 resolved by Ivan (killed blocking query, restarted pool).
Action items:
- Add query timeout (30s). Owner: Ivan. Due: April 22.
- Add alerting for connection pool saturation. Owner: Yusuf. Due: April 25.
- Felix to review reporting job query plan. Due: April 20.
